title: Quality Control Executive (Food) | Buroh Lane (West) | Up to $2.8K + OT
description:
• Basic up to $2,800 + OT Allowance Payable + Variable Bonus.

  • 5-Day Work Week (9:00 AM – 6:00 PM).

  • Buroh Lane (West area).

  • No prior experience needed; comprehensive on-the-job training provided.

  • Hands-on role within production and cold storage areas (10–15°C).

Job Summary

We are looking for a dedicated Quality Control Executive to ensure our food production meets the highest safety and quality standards. This role is perfect for a meticulous individual with a background in Food Science who is eager to learn the ropes of food safety management systems like ISO 22000 and Halal certification.

Responsibilities

  • Production Monitoring: Verify that all food production activities follow safety guidelines, product specs, and regulatory requirements.

  • Quality Inspections: Perform regular checks on production lines, including in-process inspections, to ensure consistent quality.

  • Compliance Management: Assist in maintaining systems such as ISO 22000, FSSC 22000, and Halal standards.

  • Audit Support: Assist in regulatory body reviews and customer audits; follow up on documentation and corrective actions.

  • Incident Reporting: Promptly report any deviations or non-compliance in products or processes to management.

Requirements

  • Preferably a Diploma in Food Science, Food Technology, or an equivalent field.

  • Basic understanding of local and international food safety standards is a plus.

  • Must be comfortable working in cold storage/chiller environments (10–15°C).

  • High attention to detail, reliable, and a strong willingness to learn.

postedCompany.description:
Recruit Now Singapore Pte Ltd | EA No: 21C0845


We provide solutions to all recruitment needs as well as HR services for a range of industries in Singapore. Our clients varying from well-known and established corporations to up-and-coming start-ups, put their trust in our services to provide the most efficient and effective results for recruitment and HR services. Supporting the exponential growth of our clients is and always will be what we strive for. 


We have a team of well-equipped recruiters who are dedicated to placing job seekers with the best-suited companies. We make sure our recruiters at Recruit Now are well-educated on employment laws, job market and skillsets needed for respective industries to ensure a meticulous selection process in recruitment and safe employment. 


Take your first step in finding your career.
